## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Validation

- [ ] `bash firmware/scripts/fetch_mquickjs.sh` was re-run if `firmware/scripts/x4_stdlib.c` changed.
- [ ] `cd firmware && pio run` completes successfully.
- [ ] Any affected JavaScript apps/faces were tested on-device.

## Documentation

- [ ] `README.md` updated (if needed).
- [ ] `apps/README.md` updated (if needed).
- [ ] `firmware/README.md` updated (if needed).

## Checklist

- [ ] Scope is minimal and focused.
- [ ] No generated files were edited manually.
